[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011100 3
1 1100110 4
2 0011001 3
3 1111000 4
4 1111101 6
5 1011000 3
6 0011101 4
7 1111110 6

01 0101010 3

23 1111011 6
34 0000101 2
45 0000000 a
56 0011110 4
67 1100010 3
70 1010010 3

13 1111110 6 match 7

46 1100001 3
57 0000011 2
